mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room_members (room_id, user_id) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (room_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO chat_messages (room_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id, user_id, content, created_at, deleted_at FROM chat_messages WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
